You noticed how you were feeling. That's the hard part, and you already did it.
Whatever is happening online will still be there later. It can wait.
Step away from the screen. Take three slow breaths before you do anything else.
This feeling is temporary. You don't have to solve it in front of a screen.
You are allowed to log off without an explanation.
Nothing on the other side of this screen is worth your peace right now.
